compact_object_parameter_sets.sql_predicate: coalesce(nullif(trim(Period), ''), nullif(trim(Pdot), ''), nullif(trim(B), ''), nullif(trim(Edot), ''), nullif(trim(Age), '')) is not null
coalesce(nullif(trim(NH), ''), nullif(trim(Gamma), ''), nullif(trim(kT), ''), nullif(trim(kT2), ''), nullif(trim(Flux), ''), nullif(trim(Lumin), '')) is not null
nullif(trim(RA), '') is not null and nullif(trim(Decl), '') is not null
coalesce(nullif(trim(Assoc), ''), nullif(trim(OptIR), ''), nullif(trim(Bands), ''), nullif(trim(Activity), '')) is not null
